title: R3-004 baton contract sample
summary: Describe a bounded handoff state without claiming baton persistence or resume runtime behavior.

lineage.rationale: The baton captures the bounded handoff expectations from the prepared execution bundle.

work_object_refs.notes: The baton stays tied to the same bounded task.

planning_record_refs.notes: The baton hands off the current working planning record state.

evidence.summary: The execution bundle is the direct baton evidence source.

audit.notes: Baton fixture reviewed against the focused contract test.

baton_summary: Carry forward the next bounded contract-only steps after the execution bundle is prepared.
resume_objective: Resume from the prepared contract surface without widening into flow or runtime behavior.
handoff_notes: Do not add baton persistence in R3-004.
blocked_by: R3-005 runtime flow is not yet implemented.
